revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - to avoid confusion
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}}
|Template=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:R_from_shortcut]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}}
|Template=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}}
|Template=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

[[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:R from shortcut]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]]

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}}
|Template=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}}
|Template=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia7]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}}
|Template=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no

|#default=

  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.

  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=

  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts

revision.comment: Trimmed off cruft from entries in [[:Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}}
|Template=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}}
|Template=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts

revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}

  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no

  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}}
|Template=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}}
|Template=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}}
|Template=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}}
</noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}}
|Template=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from template shortcut
  |name=From a template shortcut
  |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]'''
  |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]]
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]".
  |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
|#default=
{{Redirect template
  |id=R from shortcut
  |name=From a shortcut
  |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace
  |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}}
  |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles.
  |all category=Redirects from shortcuts
  |printworthy=no
}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}} </noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}} |Template= {{Redirect template |id=R from template shortcut |name=From a template shortcut |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]''' |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]] |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]". |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts |printworthy=no }} |#default= {{Redirect template |id=R from shortcut |name=From a shortcut |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}} |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. |all category=Redirects from shortcuts |printworthy=no }} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]". |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts |printworthy=no }} |#default= {{Redirect template |id=R from shortcut |name=From a shortcut |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}} |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. |all category=Redirects from shortcuts |printworthy=no }} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""

<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}} </noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}} |Template= {{Redirect template |id=R from template shortcut |name=From a template shortcut |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]''' |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]] |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]". |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts |printworthy=no }} |#default= {{Redirect template |id=R from shortcut |name=From a shortcut |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}} |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. |all category=Redirects from shortcuts |printworthy=no }} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{Template:This is a redirect/rcat|from shortcut}} </noinclude>{{#switch:{{#invoke:RedirectData|getRedirectToNamespace}} |Template= {{Redirect template |id=R from template shortcut |name=From a template shortcut |from=a shortcut page name '''in ''any'' [[WP:namespace|namespace]]''' |to=a page in [[WP:template namespace|template namespace]] |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. [[WP:Transclusion|Transclusions]] in mainspace are common and do not need to be "[[WP:NOTBROKEN|fixed]]". |all category=Redirects from template shortcuts |printworthy=no }} |#default= {{Redirect template |id=R from shortcut |name=From a shortcut |from=a shortcut in ''any'' namespace |to=a page in any namespace{{#if:{{{of|}}}{{{for|}}}|. The referent of this shortcut is: {{{of|{{{for}}}}}}}} |info=**Shortcuts are [[:en:Wikilink|Wikilink]]ed on community pages, talk pages, and edit summaries, but not in [[wp:mainspace|mainspace]] articles. |all category=Redirects from shortcuts |printworthy=no }} }}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
